title: Sabaody’s Cruel World: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Bastard, get away from Saint Roswald!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All right!! Leave it to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You fools, that's just a damn fish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Camie's not something you can sell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Call an Admiral and the Battle- ships!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Show them who they're dealing with!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Dowaaah!! are you trying to kill us!!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's already a mess down there.
